packageRules.description: AWS SDK crates track near-latest-stable rustc, and their minor/major bumps regularly outrun fnox's MSRV (see AGENTS.md), auto-opening PRs that can only pass by raising rust-version. Disable minor/major updates for them; bump these by hand when we're ready to raise the MSRV too. Patch updates (which don't move MSRV) still flow. Scoped to the SDK crates only — the aws-lc-rs crypto backend is intentionally not held.
